settings.html:
<style id="hz-tokens">
/* ── DARK (default) ────────────────────────── */
:root,[data-theme=dark]{
  --hz-bg:     #1A1A1A;
  --hz-bg-e:   #212121;
  --hz-bg-c:   #212121;
  --hz-bg-ph:  #171717;
  --hz-text:   #F5F0E8;
  --hz-text-s: rgba(245,240,232,.55);
  --hz-text-t: rgba(245,240,232,.3);
  --hz-text-d: rgba(245,240,232,.05);
  --hz-green:  #20C997;
  --hz-green-m:#56A176;
  --hz-border: rgba(245,240,232,.08);
  --hz-border-c:rgba(245,240,232,.12);
  --hz-tag-bg: rgba(32,201,151,.07);
  --hz-tag-bd: rgba(32,201,151,.12);
  --hz-nav-bg: rgba(26,26,26,.97);
  --hz-inp-bg: #212121;
}
/* ── LIGHT ──────────────────────────────────── */
[data-theme=light]{
  --hz-bg:     #F5F0E8;
  --hz-bg-e:   #EAE5DD;
  --hz-bg-c:   #E4DFD7;
  --hz-bg-ph:  #D8D3CB;
  --hz-text:   #1A1A1A;
  --hz-text-s: rgba(26,26,26,.6);
  --hz-text-t: rgba(26,26,26,.35);
  --hz-text-d: rgba(26,26,26,.05);
  --hz-green:  #1aad85;
  --hz-green-m:#3d8a5f;
  --hz-border: rgba(26,26,26,.1);
  --hz-border-c:rgba(26,26,26,.15);
  --hz-tag-bg: rgba(26,173,133,.07);
  --hz-tag-bd: rgba(26,173,133,.2);
  --hz-nav-bg: rgba(245,240,232,.97);
  --hz-inp-bg: #EAE5DD;
}
/* ── AUTO (OS preference) ───────────────────── */
@media(prefers-color-scheme:light){
  :root:not([data-theme=dark]){
    --hz-bg:#F5F0E8;--hz-bg-e:#EAE5DD;--hz-bg-c:#E4DFD7;--hz-bg-ph:#D8D3CB;
    --hz-text:#1A1A1A;--hz-text-s:rgba(26,26,26,.6);--hz-text-t:rgba(26,26,26,.35);
    --hz-text-d:rgba(26,26,26,.05);--hz-green:#1aad85;--hz-green-m:#3d8a5f;
    --hz-border:rgba(26,26,26,.1);--hz-border-c:rgba(26,26,26,.15);
    --hz-tag-bg:rgba(26,173,133,.07);--hz-tag-bd:rgba(26,173,133,.2);
    --hz-nav-bg:rgba(245,240,232,.97);--hz-inp-bg:#EAE5DD;
  }
}

/* ── TRANSITIONS ────────────────────────────── */
body,body *{transition:background-color .25s,border-color .25s,color .2s!important;}

/* ── PAGE BACKGROUND ────────────────────────── */
body{background-color:var(--hz-bg)!important;}

/* ── SECTION BACKGROUNDS ────────────────────── */
.hz-bg-base{background-color:var(--hz-bg)!important;}
.hz-bg-elevated{background-color:var(--hz-bg-e)!important;}

/* ── CARD / COLUMN BACKGROUNDS ──────────────── */
.hz-card,
.hz-card>.elementor-column-wrap,
.hz-card>.elementor-widget-wrap{
  background-color:var(--hz-bg-c)!important;
  border-color:var(--hz-border)!important;
}

/* ── HEADING WIDGET ─────────────────────────── */
.elementor-widget-heading .elementor-heading-title{
  color:var(--hz-text)!important;
}
.hz-accent .elementor-heading-title{color:var(--hz-green)!important;}

/* ── TEXT-EDITOR WIDGET ─────────────────────── */
.elementor-widget-text-editor p{color:var(--hz-text)!important;}
.elementor-widget-text-editor span{color:inherit;}
.elementor-widget-text-editor span[style*="#20C997"]{color:var(--hz-green)!important;}
.elementor-widget-text-editor span[style*="color:#20C997"]{color:var(--hz-green)!important;}
.elementor-widget-text-editor span[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.3)"],
.elementor-widget-text-editor span[style*="rgba(245,240,232, .3)"]{
  color:var(--hz-text-t)!important;
}
.elementor-widget-text-editor p[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.05)"]{
  color:var(--hz-text-d)!important;
}
.elementor-widget-text-editor p[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.5)"],
.elementor-widget-text-editor p[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.55)"],
.elementor-widget-text-editor p[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.45)"],
.elementor-widget-text-editor p[style*="rgba(245,240,232,.4)"]{
  color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;
}

/* ── ICON LIST ───────────────────────────────── */
.elementor-widget-icon-list .elementor-icon-list-item .elementor-icon-list-text{
  color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;
}
.elementor-widget-icon-list .elementor-icon-list-item i,
.elementor-widget-icon-list .elementor-icon-list-item svg{
  color:var(--hz-green)!important;
  fill:var(--hz-green)!important;
}

/* ── DIVIDER ─────────────────────────────────── */
.elementor-widget-divider .elementor-divider-separator{
  border-color:var(--hz-border)!important;
}

/* ── NAV ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.hznw{
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
  background:var(--hz-nav-bg)!important;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--hz-border)!important;
  transition:box-shadow .3s,background .25s,border-color .25s!important;
}
.hznw.is-scrolled{box-shadow:0 1px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.35)!important;}
.hznav a,.hznav__logo{color:var(--hz-text)!important;}
.hznav__link{color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;}
.hznav__cta{background:var(--hz-green)!important;color:#1A1A1A!important;}

/* ── FOOTER ──────────────────────────────────── */
.hzft{
  background:var(--hz-bg)!important;
  border-top:1px solid var(--hz-border)!important;
}
.hzft__name{color:var(--hz-text)!important;}
.hzft__role,.hzft__tag{color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;}
.hzft__links a{color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;}
.hzft__links a:hover{color:var(--hz-green)!important;}

/* ── FORM INPUTS ─────────────────────────────── */
.hzfi,.hzfse,.hzfta{
  background:var(--hz-inp-bg)!important;
  border-color:var(--hz-border-c)!important;
  color:var(--hz-text)!important;
}
.hzfi:focus,.hzfse:focus,.hzfta:focus{border-color:var(--hz-green)!important;}
.hzfro label{
  background:var(--hz-inp-bg)!important;
  border-color:var(--hz-border-c)!important;
  color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;
}
.hzfro input:checked+label{
  border-color:var(--hz-green)!important;
  color:var(--hz-green)!important;
  background:var(--hz-tag-bg)!important;
}
.hzft2{color:var(--hz-text)!important;}
.hzfs,.hzfh,.hzfnote{color:var(--hz-text-s)!important;}

/* ── WORK CARD PLACEHOLDER ───────────────────── */
.hz-ph{background:var(--hz-bg-ph)!important;}

/* ── SERVICE TAG LABELS ──────────────────────── */
.hz-svc-tag{
  background:var(--hz-tag-bg)!important;
  border-color:var(--hz-tag-bd)!important;
  color:var(--hz-green)!important;
}

/* ── THEME TOGGLE BUTTON ─────────────────────── */
.hz-toggle{
  background:none;border:1px solid var(--hz-border);border-radius:6px;
  padding:.38rem .55rem;cursor:pointer;color:var(--hz-text);
  font-size:.95rem;line-height:1;margin-left:.75rem;
  transition:border-color .3s,color .3s,background .3s!important;
}
.hz-toggle:hover{border-color:var(--hz-green);color:var(--hz-green);}

/* ── SCROLL REVEAL ANIMATIONS ────────────────── */
.reveal{
  opacity:0;
  transform:translateY(28px);
  transition:opacity .75s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),
             transform .75s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)!important;
}
.reveal.is-visible{
  opacity:1!important;
  transform:none!important;
}
.reveal--d1{transition-delay:.08s!important;}
.reveal--d2{transition-delay:.2s!important;}
.reveal--d3{transition-delay:.35s!important;}
.reveal--d4{transition-delay:.52s!important;}
</style>

<script>
/* 1. Restore theme before first paint (runs sync) */
(function(){
  var saved=localStorage.getItem('hz-theme');
  var auto=window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:light)').matches?'light':'dark';
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',saved||auto);
})();

/* 2. Animations — run after DOM ready */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){

  /* Scroll reveal */
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
    var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(e){
        if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('is-visible');obs.unobserve(e.target);}
      });
    },{threshold:.1,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){obs.observe(el);});
  } else {
    /* Fallback: show everything immediately */
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('is-visible');});
  }

  /* Nav scroll shadow */
  window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){
    var nav=document.querySelector('.hznw');
    if(!nav)return;
    nav.classList.toggle('is-scrolled',window.scrollY>60);
  },{passive:true});

  /* Cursor glow — desktop only */
  if(window.matchMedia('(pointer:fine)').matches){
    var g=document.createElement('div');
    g.style.cssText=
      'position:fixed;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;'
      +'background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(32,201,151,.04) 0%,transparent 70%);'
      +'transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:0;'
      +'transition:left .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),top .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);'
      +'left:-500px;top:-500px;';
    document.body.appendChild(g);
    document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
      g.style.left=e.clientX+'px';
      g.style.top=e.clientY+'px';
    },{passive:true});
  }
});
</script>

Hazem Abdelbaset
WorkAboutProcessStart a Project

settings.editor: Social media systems, campaign visuals, and selected brand identity work — for brands that want to appear as strong as they actually are.
I don’t create random posts. I build visual systems.
A complete visual system for brands that want consistent, premium social presence.
Visual direction and rollout assets for launches, seasons, offers, and campaigns.
Focused identity systems and brand refreshes for sharper visual foundations.
Luxury medical apparel branding — premium visual identity merging healthcare precision with elevated aesthetics.
Systematic social media visual language — templates and guidelines that turned scattered posting into a cohesive brand experience.
Visual direction for a seasonal launch — cohesive campaign assets across digital, social, and print.
Deep-dive into the brand’s reality — audience, message, tone, landscape.
Defining the visual direction before any design work begins. Strategy first.
Building the rules, templates, and visual language that make the brand scalable.
Delivering publish-ready assets and production files — everything the brand needs to show up.
Brand-Led Visual Designer focused on helping Arab brands appear as strong as they actually are.

My work connects brand understanding with social media systems, campaign visuals, and visual identity foundations. I don’t decorate — I build visual infrastructure that makes brands clearer, more consistent, and harder to ignore.
Your brand may not need more posts.
